user_goal: 演示 LoopForge 如何在没有额外评测集时，用 LLM-as-judge 对候选 solver 做语义评估补充。

output_contract.description: Candidate solver must expose solve(input_text: str) -> list and remain self-contained.
output_contract.dependency_policy: solver.py should use only Python standard library.

evaluator.rubric: 候选 solver 应保持 solve 接口、纯标准库、订单和骑手不重复使用、优先保持 100% 完成率，并在不破坏覆盖率的前提下降低平均惩罚。

hard_constraints: candidate output must match the declared output contract
metrics.accept_rule: LLM-as-judge is a semantic supplement in this project; local deterministic evaluation remains the acceptance gate.
